title: Implement SEO and Technical Optimization
description: Create server routes sitemap.xml.ts, robots.txt.ts, rss.xml.ts. Add useSeoMeta and Schema.org (JSON-LD) to product and blog pages. Implement rel=canonical for catalog.
acceptance_criteria: sitemap.xml is dynamically generated with all product and blog slugs
robots.txt allows all except admin/ and checkout/ and points to sitemap
rss.xml is available for the blog
Product and Blog pages have proper meta tags and JSON-LD schema
Catalog has canonical link pointing to base URL without sorting/pagination params
